verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer immediately: "Short version: default to REST"; B also starts with "start with REST" but adds more explanation afterward.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits more directly with "My recommendation for you: start with REST"; B hedges more with a table and follow-up questions before ending on REST+BFF.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now: "start with REST" and use "purpose-built aggregate endpoints" if needed.
